microsoft_ft: Owned technical POCs end-to-end across enterprise accounts (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp), platformizing a 2-person validation effort into a scalable system that sustained 45+ resilience drills annually and drove **$14M+ in business impact** across go-to-market deals.

Systematized solutions engineering work by templatizing and automating drill workflows in a 0→1 internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service capabilities that cut operational toil 30% and **completed POCs faster** at enterprise scale.

Built creative, high-impact technical solutions by pioneering Azure's first proactive testing capability, shipping a rack-level program in 4 months at a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable model for continuous validation.

Partnered as the technical counterpart to enterprise stakeholders across 14 cross-org executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation POC tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, translating technical detail into business impact.

Scaled team leverage with AI-driven automation, building an internal **AI agent** and APIs that restructured planning workflows, reduced planning cycle time 39%, and increased drill capacity 21% by templatizing and automating best practices across the team.

Served as the voice of the customer to engineering, gathering structured feedback on bugs, feature gaps, and big-picture opportunities that shaped the platform roadmap and unlocked new use cases for enterprise resilience customers.
microsoft_2023: Drove adoption of AI-driven code generation workflows by running customer-facing demos and training sessions, scaling utilization across 14 key teams and saving **37 engineering hours monthly** while translating technical capabilities into clear business value.

Influenced the product roadmap toward intent-based YAML generation by facilitating 11+ user interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and **designing solutions** for real-world technical use cases.

Optimized data integrity and retrieval by enforcing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered **semantic search** tool, cutting lookup time 83% and accelerating how teams self-served technical answers.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams, systematizing best practices to scale delivery.

Mobilized a product strategy to mitigate operational toil during region launches, running discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify 81 hours of manual effort per region and building a roadmap to **automate critical paths**.

Enabled leadership to prioritize high-impact automation by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** that tracked operational toil across 140+ teams, turning scattered signals into actionable, data-driven decisions.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping technical dependencies across 1,200+ stations to de-risk a complex rollout.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** while moving fast and balancing multiple competing technical requests at once.

Drove strategic alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle 25% and standardizing repeatable infrastructure best practices.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings **26%** by optimizing sales operations and managing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through a new **CRM process**, partnering closely with the sales team to close deals.
Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost 13% and boosted conversions 2.7% by executing a digital-first **go-to-market strategy**, optimizing the website and Google profile to reach best-fit customers.
Improved leadership pricing models by conducting financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying and sealing margin leaks to inform revenue operations decisions.
